title: Do What You Love
excerpt: This is something I truly believe. "By doing what you love, you inspire and awaken the hearts of others." Saw it on Pinterest and had to give it a colorful twist. I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I…
body:
This is something I truly believe. "By doing what you love, you inspire and awaken the hearts of others." Saw it on Pinterest and had to give it a colorful twist.

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
